chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-5454 of 2025 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ For orders as to maintainability of petition. 29.01.2026 Mr. Qadir Hussain Khan, advocate for the petitioner. ------------- Learned counsel for the petitioner under instructions does not press the instant petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Shahzad Soomro
